user.title: Connect to PreCom
user.description: Enter your PreCom account credentials. These will be stored encrypted in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PreCom
reauth_confirm.description: Your PreCom password is incorrect for **{username}**. Please re-enter your password.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your PreCom credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the PreCom API. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This PreCom account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The credentials belong to a different account and cannot be used to reconfigure this entry.

action_failed.message: The PreCom action failed due to an API error.

auth_failed.message: PreCom authentication failed. Please re-authenticate via the integration page.

no_entry_loaded.message: No PreCom integration entry is currently loaded.

set_outside_region.name: Set outside region
set_outside_region.description: Mark the PreCom user as outside their response region for a set number of hours.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: Number of hours to stay outside the region (1–72).

set_in_region.name: Set in region
set_in_region.description: Cancel the outside-region status and return to in-region.

update_alarm.name: Update alarm
update_alarm.description: Manually trigger a refresh of the latest alarm data.
